projectAnalysis.projectName: DermaIQ: Burn Grading and Treatment Recommendation Platform
projectAnalysis.projectDescription: Built an interactive Streamlit web app for image upload, visual classification, and real-time treatment recommendations.
Built the UI and API-based product scraping for an AI-powered shopping app; advanced features in progress.
Built an IoT and ML-powered automated library system to streamline book management, enhance user experience.
Built a MERN-based Product Management System with authentication and CRUD functionality.

transcript.question: Why are you interested in joining our company?
transcript.answer: I am impressed by your company's focus on innovation and strong engineering culture. I want to contribute to building impactful solutions.

transcript.question: What is your preferred working style?
transcript.answer: I thrive in collaborative, cross-functional teams where communication is transparent and everyone has ownership over their tasks.

transcript.question: How do you manage tight deadlines?
transcript.answer: I prioritize tasks using Eisenhower matrix, break them down into smaller milestones, and communicate proactively if any blockers arise.

questions_bank.question_text: Can you explain the difference between Server Components and Client Components in Next.js, and when you would use each?

What are the primary differences between fine-tuning and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) when deploying LLMs?
